calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:16am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, nothing on record, clerk-beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Xin Hua Kevin Liu, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Ying Wang, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kane.
10:18am
Parties are asked to step out in the hallway to exchange evidence, not previously shown to one another.
10:50am
Case is called again, and all parties and witnesses are present in Court. Ms. Wang calls Chrionga Chen, previously sworn, as a witness; Xin Hua Kevin Liu, calls Pauline Chan, previously sworn, as a witness.
11:37am
Case is submitted, no new evidence is identified or retained by the Court.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-13-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Continued To Aug-12-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
